summary: First-run E2E testing of StockSentinel India MVP. Backend pytest suite (14 tests across all /api endpoints) passed 100%. Frontend Bloomberg-style dashboard loads, search dropdown works, popular-stock click navigates to dashboard with all panels (price, chart, macro, sector heatmap, valuation, technical, quarterly, corporate, shareholding, news, screener, AI verdict). AI verdict (Gemini 3 Flash) generated successfully with SELL/BUY badge, confidence, target price, bull/bear/risks/catalysts and 9-factor breakdown. Chart period switcher (1D/5D/1M/6M/1Y/5Y) works.

issues: Recharts logs initial mount warning: 'width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0'. Chart still renders correctly but ResponsiveContainer needs explicit minHeight or fixed height on parent. Cosmetic only.

action_items: (Optional/cosmetic) Set explicit height on Recharts ResponsiveContainer parent in StockChart.jsx to silence width(-1)/height(-1) warning on initial mount.

(Optional) When user types in search and dropdown is open, the test had a hard time distinguishing the 'RELIANCE' popular-stock chip from dropdown's 'RELINFRA.BO' item — consider adding data-testid to popular stock chips and dropdown items for deterministic interaction.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses module-level in-memory _CACHE dict — works for single worker but won't be consistent if scaled horizontally. Fine for MVP.
AI verdict endpoint is POST but reads from cache without considering re-analysis intent; force-refresh query param would be a useful addition.
Mongo insert for ai_verdicts has try/except but doesn't include verdict creation timestamp as datetime (uses isoformat string) — acceptable, but consider Mongo native datetime for queryability.
No data-testid attributes on key interactive elements (search input, popular stock chips, period buttons, Generate Verdict button) — adding them will make Playwright tests far more robust.
seed_data_creation: None - all data fetched from live Yahoo Finance / Screener.in / Moneycontrol
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression suite is in /app/backend/tests/test_stocksentinel.py - run with: pytest backend/tests/test_stocksentinel.py -v --tb=short --junitxml=/app/test_reports/pytest/pytest_results.xml. AI verdict test can take 15-30s; first-time data fetch endpoints may be slow but are cached 60s. Use RELIANCE/TCS/INFY for reliable data. No auth, no test users needed.
rca of the issue: No critical issues found. Recharts width(-1) warning is initial-mount measurement before ResponsiveContainer parent has dimensions; fix by adding explicit height (e.g., h-64) or min-height to the chart wrapper div.
